HEARING RE: DEFENDANT BAY AREA WAREHOUSE STORES DBA FOODS CO.'s Motion For An Order Compelling Responses To Form Interrogatories, Specially Prepared Interrogatories, And Request For Production Of Documents, Sets No. One.

Defendant stipulates to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge. The pro tem judge and counsel for defendant (both appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Motion to compel GRANTED. No timely opposition filed. Verified responses to the form interrogatories, special interrogatories, and requests for production of documents are to be served within 20 days of notice of entry of this order. CCP 2030.290, 2031.300.

Order signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Scott Borrowman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/JPT)
